findings.message: PII (owner_email) is being logged in violation of explicit model guidance. Line 16 of models.py states 'do not include in logs or external responses', but this log statement includes owner_email from the request payload.
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from the log statement. Replace 'log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id, owner_email=payload.owner_email)' with 'log.info("item_created", item_id=item.id)' to avoid logging PII.
